description.value:
The standard military warbow, capable of launching arrows in excess of six hundred feet. Masters of the longbow learn to compensate for difficult conditions, maintaining accuracy even when the odds are against them.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d6 (80/320), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d8 (120/600), Piercing, Keen
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d8 (120/600), Piercing, Keen, disadvantage negation
Master PerkIf you would have disadvantage on an attack, you may use your bonus action to negate it. You no longer have disadvantage for firing beyond normal range.

rmeData.masterPerk: If you would have disadvantage on an attack, use your bonus action to negate it. You no longer suffer disadvantage for firing beyond normal range.
